summary: Completed comprehensive testing of search and product variants functionality. All 8 requested features are working correctly: Search for breed names (pug, beagle, shih tzu) returns products, Typeahead API returns products with images and prices, Product Detail Page shows 'Customize Your Order' section with Base/Flavour options, Option selection works correctly with price updates, Add to Cart works with selected variant, Shop Page shows 'Options Available' badge and 'Select Options' button for products with variants.

1_search_pug.details: GET /api/search?q=pug returns Pug products from unified_products with intelligent_tags. Found Pug cake and Pug Feeding Mat.

3_search_shih_tzu.details: GET /api/search?q=shih%20tzu returns Mynx Shih Tzu Cake product.

4_typeahead_api.details: GET /api/search/typeahead?q=pug returns products with id, name, image, and price fields. Navbar dropdown shows suggestions correctly.

5_product_detail_options.details: Product Detail Page shows 'Customize Your Order' section with Base (Oats/Ragi) and Flavour (Chicken/Chicken Liver/Mutton/Banana/Cheeku/Coconut/Mango/Veggies) options.

6_option_selection.details: Clicking on option buttons updates the selected variant. Price updates dynamically (e.g., Mutton ₹1,200 vs Chicken ₹999). Selected variant summary shows correctly.

7_add_to_cart_validation.details: Products with options have default variant pre-selected. Add to Cart works correctly with selected variant info (e.g., 'Pug (Oats / Chicken)').

8_shop_page_badges.details: Shop Page shows 'Options Available' purple badge on products with variants. 'Select Options' button appears on hover instead of 'Quick Add' for products with options.

api_tests.search_shih_tzu: PASS - GET /api/search?q=shih%20tzu returns Shih Tzu products
api_tests.typeahead_pug: PASS - GET /api/search/typeahead?q=pug returns products with images
api_tests.product_detail: PASS - GET /api/products/shopify-6622536827034 returns product with options and variants
api_tests.products_list: PASS - GET /api/products returns products with variant info

updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_search_variants.py - Created comprehensive search and variants tests
seed_data_creation: Used existing product shopify-6622536827034 (Pug cake) for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All search and product variant features are working correctly. Search queries unified_products collection with intelligent_tags for breed matching. Typeahead returns products with proper image and price fields. Product Detail Page shows 'Customize Your Order' section with selectable options. Shop Page shows 'Options Available' badge and 'Select Options' button for products with variants.

verified_flows.search_to_product: Search 'pug' -> Dropdown shows Pug products with images -> Click navigates to Product Detail Page
verified_flows.product_options: Product Detail Page -> 'Customize Your Order' section -> Base (Oats/Ragi) + Flavour (8 options) -> Price updates on selection
verified_flows.add_to_cart: Select options -> Add to Cart -> Cart shows product with variant info (e.g., 'Pug (Oats / Chicken)')
verified_flows.shop_page_variants: Shop Page -> Products with variants show 'Options Available' badge -> Hover shows 'Select Options' button
